channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Full Text of U.S.-Iran Memorandum of Understanding
item.description: Below is the complete text of the U.S.-Iran memorandum of understanding, as provided by a senior administration official during a press briefing.

item.title: Anthropic export ban raises concerns for AI industry
item.description: The White House's use of export controls to restrict access to Anthropic's latest AI model could hurt long-term financial prospects.

item.title: Trump's DNI pick hearing canceled over voting law dispute
item.description: A confirmation hearing for President Trump's DNI nominee Jay Clayton was abruptly canceled Wednesday after a dispute over voting laws.

item.title: Trump and AI CEOs discuss global AI regulations
item.description: President Trump and top officials discussed a U.S.-led effort to coordinate global AI standards at a meeting with AI CEOs on Wednesday.
